text: FY2026 Q3 revenue was USD82.886bn, diluted EPS was USD4.27, and Azure grew 39% in constant currency.
Pre-release estimates were USD81.46bn revenue, USD4.04 EPS, and 37%-38% Azure constant-currency growth; the dated price-target reference was USD565.28 from 32 analysts.
The dated peer table provides 2026E and 2027E P/E plus EV/EBITDA for GOOGL, AMZN, META, ORCL, CRM, and MSFT.
Q1 2026 net sales were USD181.519bn, diluted EPS was USD2.78, AWS revenue was USD37.587bn, and AWS operating margin was 37.7%.
Pre-release estimates were USD177.10bn revenue, USD1.63 EPS, USD36.80bn AWS revenue, and 35.7% AWS margin; the target reference was USD287.24 from 41 analysts.
The GAAP EPS result includes a material investment-related gain, so the workflow keeps GAAP and adjusted EPS series separate and foregrounds AWS revenue and margin.
Kasikorn Securities forecast THB26.4bn reported profit and THB31.2bn core profit, with hedging and impairment losses offsetting stock gains and stronger subsidiaries.
PTT reported THB25.738bn net profit and THB28.589bn core profit; market GRM was USD13.1 per barrel, inventory gain USD16.9, and hedging loss USD4.8 per barrel.
InnovestX used SOTP for a THB44 target and supplied dated 2026E P/E, P/BV, and EV/EBITDA for PTT and Thai energy peers.
